nodes.title: Create Tmux Session
nodes.description: POST /api/tmux/session with {name, worktreePath, command}. Creates new tmux session with specified name. Attaches to worktree directory. Returns {name, created: true}.

nodes.title: List Tmux Sessions
nodes.description: GET /api/tmux/sessions. Returns array of {name, worktreePath, attached: boolean, createdAt}. Lists all tmux sessions managed by Grove.

nodes.title: Kill Tmux Session
nodes.description: DELETE /api/tmux/session/:name. Kills tmux session. Returns {killed: true}. No error if session doesn't exist.

nodes.title: Send To Tmux
nodes.description: POST /api/tmux/session/:name/send with {command}. Sends command to tmux session. Returns {sent: true}. Command is typed into session.

nodes.title: Capture Tmux Output
nodes.description: GET /api/tmux/session/:name/output. Returns {output, cursorPosition}. Captures current terminal buffer. Used for status detection.

nodes.title: Attach Tmux Session
nodes.description: When user presses Enter on agent. Attaches to tmux session, passing through keystrokes. Terminal takes over full screen. Detach with Ctrl+B then D.
